metadata.title: Tigre — Fast Food Delivery in Under 30 Minutes | Order Online
metadata.description: Order delicious food from the best restaurants in your city with Tigre. Fast delivery under 30 minutes, real-time tracking, and amazing taste.

hero.description: From the best restaurants straight to your door – in under 30 minutes, every single time.

getApp.title: Get the App
getApp.heading: Order in
getApp.description: The Tigre app makes ordering as effortless as hunger itself. Discover, tap, eat. Your city's best food is one swipe away.

growWithTigre.heading: Grow With Tigre
growWithTigre.description: Join the fastest-growing delivery network in the city. Reach thousands of hungry customers, grow your revenue, and manage everything from one powerful dashboard.

moreRevenue.title: More Revenue
moreRevenue.desc: Average partners see +40% revenue in their first 3 months.

newCustomers.title: New Customers
newCustomers.desc: Tap into 50,000+ active Tigre users hungry for new spots.

smartDashboard.title: Smart Dashboard
smartDashboard.desc: Orders, analytics, menu management, reviews — all in one clean interface. No tech skills needed.

fastOnboarding.title: Fast Onboarding
fastOnboarding.desc: Go live in less than 24 hours. Our team handles everything.

featuredSpots.title: Featured Spots
featuredSpots.desc: Top partners get promoted in the app to thousands of users.

whoWeAre.title: Hunger Solved Instantly
whoWeAre.description: Tigre is the boldest food delivery platform in the city — built for people who refuse to wait. We connect you with the best restaurants, the fastest riders, and an experience that's completely seamless.

fastDelivery.title: Lightning Fast Delivery
fastDelivery.desc: Average delivery time under 30 minutes. We move fast so your food stays hot.

restaurantVariety.title: Massive Restaurant Variety
restaurantVariety.desc: From street food to fine dining — over 500 restaurants at your fingertips.

easyToUse.title: Ridiculously Easy to Use
easyToUse.desc: Order in under 60 seconds. Track your rider live. No friction, just food.

footer.brandDescription: The fastest food delivery platform in the city. Built for speed, taste, and relentless pursuit of a great meal.
footer.builtForSpeed: Built for speed. Built for taste.

aboutHero.movementDescription: We didn't just build another delivery app: we built a movement for people who demand exceptional food, delivered with all power and speed.
